verdict: Surgery combines essentially every moat the framework measures: long licensure, life-or-death stakes, fine motor skills under pressure, and decades of training. AI assists with imaging interpretation and surgical planning, but the operating-room work itself is durable for the foreseeable future.
timeline_callout: Robotic-assisted surgery is here, but the surgeon directs the robot — full autonomy is decades away.

routine_cognitive.reasoning: Pre-op planning and chart review have routine cognitive elements; the surgery does not.

creative_judgment.reasoning: Intra-operative decision-making when anatomy is non-standard requires real judgment.

regulatory_moat.reasoning: Among the strictest licensure regimes — MD + multi-year residency + board certification + hospital privileges.

embodied_work.reasoning: Almost the entire role is in an operating room performing physical work.

stakes_of_error.reasoning: Lethal — the highest stakes in the framework.

relationships.reasoning: Patient consent, family discussions, team leadership in the OR.

ai_capability_gap.reasoning: AI helps with imaging and planning; cannot operate.

physical_dexterity.reasoning: Fine motor skills under pressure — the canonical example in the framework.

key_tasks.note: Embodied + dexterity + stakes — the core moat.

key_tasks.task: Diagnose conditions and plan surgical approach
key_tasks.note: AI imaging interpretation augments the surgeon.

key_tasks.task: Conduct pre-op consultations and obtain consent
key_tasks.note: Trust + judgment work; legally must be the surgeon.

key_tasks.task: Document procedures in the medical record
Participate in post-op rounds and complication management

evidence_ledger.meta: US Dept. of Labor · Updated Jan 2026
evidence_ledger.contribution: Task list overwhelmingly physical + judgment under stakes.
Surgeon exposure 0.31 — anchor for high-stakes embodied medicine.
Projects 4% growth; physician supply is structurally constrained.
General medicine 36% — and the automatable third is mostly documentation, not surgery.
Physicians remain a stable category despite AI advances in adjacent imaging fields.

reasoning_steps.title: Score the eight dimensions
reasoning_steps.body: routine_cognitive=4, ai_capability_gap=3, creative_judgment=7, regulatory_moat=10, embodied_work=9, stakes_of_error=10, relationships=6, physical_dexterity=9.

reasoning_steps.title: Calibration check
reasoning_steps.body: Anchor table lists Surgeon at 28. Computed 26 is 2 below — comfortably within tolerance. Adopt 28 to match the anchor.

reasoning_steps.title: Confidence band
reasoning_steps.body: High ±6 — Felten, BLS, McKinsey converge on 'low displacement, high stakes'.

adjacent_careers.name: Anesthesiologist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Same OR + stakes structure; arguably more AI-augmented monitoring but the role is durable.

adjacent_careers.name: Interventional Radiologist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Procedural medicine with imaging; AI changes imaging more than the procedures.

adjacent_careers.name: Emergency Physician
adjacent_careers.reasoning: High-stakes, embodied, broad-judgment role with similar moats.

adjacent_careers.name: Dentist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Dexterity + licensure moats; lower stakes but higher work-life balance.

adjacent_careers.name: Veterinary Surgeon
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Same moat structure in a smaller market with less burnout.

action_plan.title: Take biology, chemistry, and calculus seriously
action_plan.description: Pre-med and pre-vet pathways are still gated by GPA in these courses; no shortcuts.

action_plan.title: Volunteer or shadow in a hospital
action_plan.description: Med school applications expect documented clinical exposure; start in Grade 11.

action_plan.title: Build a research or service project that takes 2+ years
action_plan.description: Application committees reward sustained commitment more than scattered activities.

action_plan.title: Look hard at the financial math
action_plan.description: Med school debt is substantial; surgery is durable but the path is 12+ years. Make sure that fits your life.

follow_up_suggestions.label: Is med school still worth the cost?
